description: The §41.14 canonical <formFor> compiles cleanly AND wires its validity surface at runtime (Bug-58 + Bug-61 regression lock). Codes: no E-FORMFOR-* and no E-DG-002/W-DG-002 per-field orphans. Runtime INITIAL: the synth compound `signup` + per-field cells are declared; every required field seeds a .Required error; signup.isValid is false; the form + 3 labelled fields render and the submit button is disabled. (The interactive halves — typing, valid-enable, submit — are the sibling formfor-* cases.)
rationale:
§41.14.2/.3 + §55.5-.7: auto-synthesizes the signup compound (name/email/agree), seeds each required field to a .Required error, gates the submit button on !signup.isValid, and renders per-field

defaults. This closes the W3 (b) runtime half the case previously deferred; the message TEXT is impl-freedom (asserted via state + structure, not text).
